configurePresets.name: msvc-x64
configurePresets.description: Pinned VS2022 v143 toolset (VS2026/v18 resolves via vswhere but is NOT OBS-validated). Absolute paths (OBS_SRC/OBS_BUILD/CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH/MOXRELAY_OBS_RUNDIR) come from the git-ignored CMakeUserPresets.json.

configurePresets.name: clangd-base
configurePresets.displayName: clangd compilation database fragment (Ninja sidecar; configure-only)
configurePresets.description: Emits cmake-build-clangd/compile_commands.json for clangd; the VS generator cannot (CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS is a no-op there). Combine with your local-paths preset in CMakeUserPresets.json, e.g. inherits ["clangd-base", "local"], and configure from a VS dev shell. Never built -- the real build keeps the VS generator. The repo-root .clangd file points clangd at the sidecar directory.
